programme.desc: In this six-part miniseries, filmed on Shalom farm in Greytown, KwaZulu Natal in South Africa, Angus Buchan talks about what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Quick Study With Rod Hembree
programme.desc: Hosted by Rod, Janice, Ryan Hembree and Corie Hembree-Bobechko, this daily 30-minute program guides viewers through the Bible in one year. It will change the way you see the past, present and future.

programme.title: SuperSquad - CE Global
programme.desc: Captain Can-Do and Sparkle, together with their friends, take children on adventures where they are taught biblical educational principles such as sharing, being kind, helpful and how to worship God.

programme.title: Victorious Living With Des And Sandy
programme.desc: Lift up the name of Jesus to see lives transformed. Connecting people to people and people to God. Preaching Jesus through Bible teachings offering hope and new beginnings.

programme.title: Believer's Voice Of Victory
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach about faith, love, healing, prosperity, redemption, righteousness, the anointing and principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromised Word of God.

programme.title: Prophetic Encounter - Jacques vd...
programme.desc: 'Prophetic Encounter - Jacques vd Westhuizen'. For all who desire prophetic direction, inspiration, and activation. Pastor Jacques van der Westhuizen desires to see the redemption and restoration of all people.

programme.title: Faith Today
programme.desc: Join Dr Andre and Jenny as they share exciting news and interview guests from all around the world.

programme.title: Hour Of Salvation - David Ibiyeomie
programme.desc: David Ibiyeomie is the presiding Pastor of Salvation Ministries. Pastor to millions across the globe, he is also a teacher and writer with the sole aim of impacting lives.

programme.title: Hosting The Supernatural
programme.desc: A talk show hosted by Apostle Nicky van der Westhuizen. The show features special guest interviews, musical performances, family and leadership insights, and segments on how to host the supernatural in our daily lives.

programme.title: Encounter with Leon du Preez
programme.desc: Encounter is a church of the supernatural. Where people can experience the manifest presence and power of God in a life-changing, tangible way.

programme.title: Spirit Of Prayer
programme.desc: A dynamic leader and visionary who serves as the Senior Pastor of Conquering Through Prayer Ministries. He is a leading and influential voice both nationally and internationally, known for his practical approach to prayer.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.desc: Excellence is the standard of life that Creflo insists on. His goal is to teach the Gospel of Jesus with simplicity and understanding, changing the world one person at a time.

programme.title: Winning Ways With Matthew Ashimolowo
programme.desc: Pastor Ashimolowo uses his dynamic gift as a pastor, teacher, mentor, businessman and spiritual father to inspire people to grow up in knowledge, grow big in the Great Commission and grow together in unity.

programme.desc: Survivors of a suspension-bridge collapse learn that there is no way to Death.

My Best Friend's Wedding

programme.desc: Detective Mason Storm stumbles onto a high-level political corruption scheme, his family is murdered and he is left for dead.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a talented, young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: The Young Kieslowski

programme.desc: Maniacal techno-expert Travis Dane hijacks a train and converts it into a command center.

programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Blade

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Graveyard of the Atlantic'. On a remote North Carolina Island, witnesses report seeing spooky apparitions. Plus, a restaurant quakes with possible ghostly activity.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Old Sweet Springs'. Nick and Katrina submerge themselves among the spirits of West Virginia's Old Sweet Springs Resort. What lurks beneath the surface at this once-idyllic retreat?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Bellaire House'. The team is in Ohio to help a mother identify the dark energy forcing her family to flee their home - and find chilling evidence about the spirit's evil intentions.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Rise Of The Planet Killer'. Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon. Plus, NASA track an asteroid heading towards Earth and make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Las Vegas'. Why was Las Vegas a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for Atomic Bombs, and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists?

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Extraterrestrials Debrief...

programme.desc: 'S1/E114 of 208'. Puleng finds herself fighting a battle she did not envisage. Mpumi and Sarah mend fences. Prudence sails dangerously close to the wind.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: 'S5/E122 of 260'. A blast from the past awakens old feelings in Noma. Siyanda does not know what to do with a lucrative find.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E97 of 260 - Mea Culpa'. News of the shack tragedy spread across Refilwe and Tumi finds herself at a crossroads.

programme.title: Finding Mr Right
programme.desc: When a politician is offered the ambassador job, he believes that it's time to start afresh. However, that includes getting rid of his supportive wife.

programme.title: VIP Invite
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 of 13'. He is known for gathering thousands of worshippers but this time, Dr Tumi invites us into the hardest and deepest time of his life as he worships together with Hle.

programme.title: eBukhosini
programme.desc: Ndabezitha Mahlangu mediates in the case of Victoria, who bought a house from Linah and is now demanding her money back. There's also the case of Betty, who's being accused of being a witch.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 of 260'. Gladys is given an ultimatum, apologize to Sonto or be dealt with by the SGB. Zodwa kicks Don and Sibongile out of her shack and the Molefe sisters order Sbonga to deal with Gladys.

programme.title: The River

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: 'S5/E123 of 260'. Noma struggles with the feelings Charles brings back up for her. Siyanda makes a drastic move she might come to regret.

programme.title: The Ranakas
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 of 13'. Ntate Ranaka finally finds the missing branch in the Ranaka family tree after 70 years. Mama Siba and Koko reflect on the expectations and responsibilities that Dineo's calling has placed on them.

programme.title: Unmarried
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 of 16'. Brenda is trying to settle into her sudden motherhood, so she joins a mommy group. She finds Lesego's blog on the laptop and discovers the blog written about her.

programme.title: Isithembiso
programme.desc: 'S1/E151 of 208'. Banzi lands himself in hot water. Elsewhere, Oscar unintentionally stirs up trouble in Santa Barbara.

programme.title: The Saints
programme.desc: The head of the maximum-security prison decides to create an isolated cell block for all the intelligent and cunning prisoners to separate them from the other inmates.

programme.title: Gospel 10 At 10

programme.desc: 'S2/E30 of 39'. The lively animal kingdom twins, Tjiff and Tjaff, are very inquisitive! They can't wait to play outside each day. But what can they do outside? Come and play with Tjiff and Tjaff.

programme.title: Zim Zim

programme.title: Precession

programme.desc: Anele and Zamuxolo decided to get married, but secrets involving their dearest and the truth about each other threaten to destroy their future

programme.desc: A group of nyaope addicts gets together to smoke, get high and pass out. But then they wake up to find a dead body next to them. Who could be responsible?

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S1/E116 of 208'. Puleng is brought to tears when she realises Mandla may replace her permanently with Seipati. Phakade is given his first initiation. Donald and Mpumi take their long overdue honeymoon.

programme.title: I Blew It Second Chances
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 13'. Two traumatic experiences led Magiva to losing his vision. Magiva received a sum of R2.8 million. He blew it on lavish parties and women. He gets a second chance and can become a musician.

programme.title: Mnakwethu
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 of 14'. Makhoba wants Musa Mseleku to help him ask his wife to permit him to take a second wife, which would however require that they dissolve their civil marriage first.
